current_state.candidate_command: /inner-brain-candidates returns numbered candidate lines such as '1. prompt'.
current_state.desktop_template: AssistantPanel has a candidate index QSpinBox and fill buttons for teach/label templates.
current_state.state_sync: 0.25.0 syncs status, button enabled state, and index maximum after /inner-brain-candidates.

gap: The desktop panel still requires users to map the transcript candidate line to a numeric stepper manually. There is no UI control directly bound to a selected candidate row.

target.behavior: After /inner-brain-candidates, populate a desktop candidate selector from numbered candidate lines. Selecting an option synchronizes the numeric index. Template buttons still fill only the input box and never submit automatically.
non_goals: No new natural language regex routing
No automatic training or command execution
No real provider configuration or API key changes

similar_patterns: QSpinBox candidate index control in AssistantPanel
Desktop widget tests expose small helper methods for UI state assertions

verification.red: Add desktop widget tests for candidate selector population and selection-to-template binding, plus version metadata test.
verification.green: Implement selector parsing/sync and bump project version to 0.26.0.
verification.regression: Run desktop widget tests, adjacent desktop/agent/LLM/InnerBrain tests, full unittest, desktop smoke, installer build, and static checks.

tooling_note: sequential-thinking/shrimp/code-index/exa MCP are unavailable in this session; using rg, targeted file reads, update_plan, apply_patch, TDD, local unittest and smoke/package verification.
